subparts.text: Define a difference equation. How is it used in time series modeling? 2.5
Explain the concept of lag operators with an example. 2.5
Differentiate between autocorrelation and partial autocorrelation. 2.5
What is the significance of the autocorrelation function in time series analysis? 2.5
What are the key characteristics of ARCH and GARCH models? 2.5
Explain how volatility clustering is captured in a GARCH model. 2.5
What is the difference between deterministic and stochastic trends? 2.5
Define unit roots and their importance in time series analysis. 2.5

questions.question_text: Analyze the role of undetermined coefficients in solving difference equations. Illustrate with an example.
What is the cobweb model? State its importance in economic modeling.
What is parameter instability in time series models, and how does it affect forecasting?
Analyze the steps involved in estimating and diagnosing an ARMA model using a real-world dataset.
Provide a practical example of using GARCH models in financial risk management.
Construct a hypothetical ARCH-M model, and explain its implications for economic data.
Examine the methods for testing structural change in time series data.
Discuss the role of Monte Carlo methods in evaluating unit root tests.
